name: Coach - Pairing - Claude
description: Launches Claude Code as a live pairing coach via tuple connect when transcription starts. Claude watches for pairing anti-patterns — backseat driving, quiet pair, silent driver, no shared goal, no swaps or breaks — and surfaces a one-line move when confident. When the call ends, it writes a retro (pairing-evaluation.md) with talk-time balance, timestamped anti-pattern quotes, what worked, and one thing to practice next session.
